Appearances:
Plaintiff Whitecliff 1 Apartments, LTD., is present. Represented by Eric Smith.
Attorney Ryan Mayberry appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Charles Lovano is present.
Attorney Robert Moreno representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Nils Rosenquist, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of MAY-21-2012 is vacated.
